associationId.description: Unique identifier of the Association fact (UUIDv7)

ownerId.description: Owner identifier (UID) who generated this association fact.

operation.description: Immutable lifecycle operation for this object-marker link

participantKeys.description: Backend-derived indexing helper mapping unique keys of participants

objectIds.description: Backend-derived indexing helper of related object IDs

markerKeys.description: Backend-derived indexing helper of related marker keys

placeIds.description: Backend-derived indexing helper of related place IDs

readerIds.description: Backend-derived indexing helper of related reader IDs

deviceIds.description: Backend-derived indexing helper of related device IDs

userIds.description: Backend-derived indexing helper of related user UIDs

effectiveAt.description: Domain timestamp at which this operation became effective (RFC 3339 format)

subjectAssociationId.description: The target Association Fact ID that is being detached or replaced (mandatory for detach and replace operations)
